issues.description: Condition should check if THIS CHARACTER is rested, not if a Supernovas card exists on board. Should use a resting state check on self.
Target should be LIMITED to {Supernovas} or {Navy} type Leaders and Characters only, not all own characters and leader. Scope is too broad.
[Your Turn] in text indicates duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'
Second effect should not exist as separate entry. Should be one effect with condition checking for either type, not two separate Activated effects.
